es.gob.fnmt.net

Class DroidHttpClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • es.gob.fnmt.net.DroidHttpClient

  • public final class DroidHttpClient
extends java.lang.Object
    Manage secure HTTPS client connection with both client and server certificate authentication.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static class  DroidHttpClient.Builder
      Java builder pattern class used to set DroidHttpClient parameters.
      static class  DroidHttpClient.CookiePolicy 
      static class  DroidHttpClient.MultipartData
      Class that manage multipart data for 'post' method.
      static class  DroidHttpClient.Parse
      Class to manipulate the HTML content recovered.

    • Method Detail

      • addRequestHeader

        public void addRequestHeader(java.lang.String key,
                             java.lang.String value)
        Add specific header fields following RFC 7230. If the key exists, value will be overwritten.
        Parameters:
        key - name of the header field.
        value - value of the header field.

      • clearRequestHeaders

        public void clearRequestHeaders()
        Remove all the header fields.

      • connect

        public void connect(java.lang.String URL)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Connect to the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • connect

        public void connect(java.lang.String URL,
                    java.lang.String method)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Connect to the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        method - force GET or POST method.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • connect

        public void connect(java.lang.String URL,
                    java.lang.String method,
                    java.lang.String[] params,
                    boolean fixedURL)
             throws java.io.IOException
        Connect to the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        method - force GET or POST method.
        params - array of request parameters in the string format 'name=value'.
        fixedURL - if the URL must not be parameterized (only for POST method).
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • deleteRequestHeader

        public void deleteRequestHeader(java.lang.String key)
        Delete the header field.
        Parameters:
        key - name of the header field.

                                   java.lang.String method,

                                   boolean fixedURL)

        Get the content from the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        url - the web site to connect.
        method - force GET or POST method.
        params - array of request parameters in the string format 'name=value'.
        fixedURL - if the URL must not be parameterized (only for POST method).
        Returns:
        HTTPEntity recovered.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getHTMLContent

        public final java.lang.String getHTMLContent(java.lang.String URL)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTML content response from the URL connection.

        Returns:
        the web page as a string.

      • getHTMLContent

        public final java.lang.String getHTMLContent(java.lang.String URL,
                                             java.lang.String charSet,
                                             DroidHttpClient.MultipartData multipartData)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTML content response from the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        charSet - the character codification.
        multipartData - request parameters.
        Returns:
        the web page as a string.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getHTMLContent

        public final java.lang.String getHTMLContent(java.lang.String URL,
                                             java.lang.String method,
                                             java.lang.String[] params,
                                             boolean fixedURL)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTML content response from the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        method - GET, POST or default request method.
        params - array of request parameters in the string format 'name=value'.
        fixedURL - if the URL must not be parameterized (only for POST method).
        Returns:
        the web page as a string.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getHTMLContent

        public final java.lang.String getHTMLContent(java.lang.String URL,
                                             java.lang.String charSet,
                                             java.lang.String method,
                                             java.lang.String[] params,
                                             boolean fixedURL)
                                      throws java.io.IOException
        Get the HTML content response from the URL connection.
        Parameters:
        URL - the web site to connect.
        charSet - the character codification.
        method - GET, POST or default request method.
        params - array of request parameters in the string format 'name=value'.
        fixedURL - if the URL must not be parameterized (only for POST method).
        Returns:
        the web page as a string.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        Returns:
        KeyStore
        Throws:
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStorePassword)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        keyStorePassword - password that protects the keystore.
        Returns:
        KeyStore
        Throws:
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • getKeyStoreFromResource

        public static java.security.KeyStore getKeyStoreFromResource(int trustKeyStoreResource,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStorePassword,
                                                             java.lang.String keyStoreType,
                                                             java.lang.String provider)
                                                      throws java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                             java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                             java.security.cert.CertificateException,
                                                             java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                             java.io.IOException
        Build KeyStore object from resource.
        Parameters:
        trustKeyStoreResource - identification of the resource to load.
        keyStorePassword - password that protects the keystore.
        keyStoreType - type of the keystore to load ("JKS", "JCEKS", "BKS", "PKCS12", etc. More info at https://docs.oracle.com/javase/8/docs/technotes/guides/security/StandardNames.html#KeyStore).
        provider - provider use to load the keystore. Set null if default JCA Provider must be used.
        Returns:
        KeyStore
        Throws:
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.cert.CertificateException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.io.IOException

      • getLastStatusError

        public int getLastStatusError()
        Get the HTTP last status recovered.
        Returns:
        the HTTP status.

        Return request headers set.

      • getSocketFactory

        public javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory getSocketFactory()
                                                throws java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException,
                                                       java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException,
                                                       java.security.KeyStoreException,
                                                       java.security.NoSuchProviderException,
                                                       java.security.KeyManagementException
        Return a javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory object instance.
        Returns:
        javax.net.ssl.SSLSocketFactory object instance.
        Throws:
        java.security.UnrecoverableKeyException
        java.security.NoSuchAlgorithmException
        java.security.KeyStoreException
        java.security.NoSuchProviderException
        java.security.KeyManagementException

        method - GET, POST or default request method.
        params - array of request parameters in the string format 'name=value'.
        fixedURL - if the URL must not be parameterized (only for POST method).
        Returns:
        stream of content recovered.
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException
